title: becium centraliafricanum
intro: Becium centraliafricanum, also known as African blue basil, is a plant species native to Central Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its essential oils, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Becium centraliafricanum include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce stress, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, as well as being used in traditional medicine in various forms, including essential oil and dried leaves.
